title: Customise Sub Item View in Tables
excerpt: Be able to customise the column view at sub item level the same as you can for parent level. Hide and/or remove columns from view at this level.

posts.author: carcher85 (Claire Archer)
posts.cookedHtml: Be able to customise the column view at sub item level the same as you can for parent level. Hide and/or remove columns from view at this level.
